name: HuggingFace Datasets (ML Dataset Library)

auth.notes: HuggingFace token for private/gated datasets; public datasets no auth

performance.notes: Apache Arrow memory-mapped; streaming avoids full download for huge datasets

agent_readiness.notes: Access 100,000+ datasets from HuggingFace Hub. load_dataset('squad'). load_dataset('csv', data_files='data.csv'). Streaming: load_dataset(..., streaming=True). DatasetDict with train/validation/test splits. .map() for preprocessing (parallelizable). .filter(). .select(). Arrow-backed for zero-copy operations. Push to Hub: dataset.push_to_hub('username/dataset'). Caching for repeated loads. Audio/image datasets. The standard ML dataset library.

gotchas: Large datasets cached to disk (~GB); disk space management needed
Gated datasets require HF token and model card agreement
Streaming mode limited in some operations (no random access)
map() with num_proc parallelism can cause fork issues on macOS
best_when: Loading standard ML benchmark datasets (SQUAD, GLUE, ImageNet, etc.)
Preprocessing and tokenizing NLP datasets for training
Streaming large datasets that don't fit in memory
Sharing custom datasets via HuggingFace Hub
avoid_when: Custom data pipelines with complex transformations (PyTorch Dataset class)
Real-time data ingestion (not designed for streaming pipelines)
summary: HuggingFace Datasets provides access to 100,000+ ML datasets. load_dataset('squad'). Apache Arrow-backed for fast memory-mapped access. Streaming mode for huge datasets. .map() for parallel preprocessing. DatasetDict with splits. Audio/image/text support. Push to Hub for sharing. The standard library for ML training data loading and preprocessing.
